name: University Bus Co
owner_or_parent: unknown - shares 18-02 River Rd address with Scholastic Bus Company (may be affiliated/DBA or co-located)
principals: Mike Ely (listed President per source data; LinkedIn shows him as 'factotum' at Scholastic Bus Company at same address)
districts_or_customers: Bergen/Passaic County area schools (Fair Lawn / Paterson region) - not explicitly confirmed
recent_news: No recent M&A or news found. Scholastic Bus Co (same address) has an Inactive DOT status per BrokerSnapshot, raising questions about operating status of the entity at this location.
fit_notes: In-state NJ tuck-in candidate but identity is murky - same address as Scholastic Bus Co with overlapping personnel suggests possible affiliated/inactive entity. Would require direct outreach to confirm operating status, fleet, and ownership before pursuing.

name: Byram Bus Inc
principals: Frank Walker (Manager per source data; family name not publicly confirmed)
recent_news: No recent M&A news. Company actively hiring CDL drivers and offers CDL training program. Active social media presence (Facebook, Instagram).
fit_notes: Attractive in-state NJ tuck-in: family-owned 60-year operator with school + charter mix in Sussex County (north NJ), diversified into auto repair and CDL training. Long tenure suggests potential succession opportunity. Small but established with district contracts.

name: Palmer Bus Svc Of Maple River
owner_or_parent: Palmer Bus Service, Inc. (parent - family-owned, headquartered in Mankato/St. Clair, MN)
principals: Jenna Fromm (CEO, co-owner, daughter of founders)
Debbie Reuter (Mapleton/Maple River Site Manager since 2021)
districts_or_customers: Maple River School District #2135 (ISD 2135) - ~700 students from Mapleton, Amboy, Good Thunder, Minnesota Lake
recent_news: 2024: Palmer Bus Service won NSTA Contractor of the Year award at 50th anniversary; parent company expanded with new Greenway (~1,000 students) and Nashwauk-Keewatin (~580 students) district contracts in 2024; adopted Bytecurve360 fleet optimization platform. Parent operates ~750 buses across 22 divisions in MN.
fit_notes: Not a true tuck-in target as an individual site - this is one of 22 divisions of Palmer Bus Service, Inc., a ~750-bus 2nd-generation family-owned MN platform. Parent company is itself a potential platform-level acquisition target rather than a small tuck-in. Second-gen family ownership with active CEO suggests near-term succession unlikely.

name: AC School Svc Inc
owner_or_parent: Anderson Coach & Travel (likely affiliate/division - AC = Anderson Coach; shares Conneaut Lake operations and goschoolbus.com / goanderson.com web presence)
principals: Joseph Warren (Owner, Anderson Coach School Bus Services)
Founders: O.D. Anderson & Dortha 'Dot' Elder Anderson (1937, founded in Mercer PA)
recent_news: No recent M&A news. Anderson Coach is a long-standing 80+ year family business now in 2nd-3rd generation ownership; active charter, tour, and school bus operations across PA/OH/NY.
website: https://www.goanderson.com/ (parent); goschoolbus.com listed for AC School Service
fit_notes: AC School Service appears to be the school bus arm/affiliate of Anderson Coach & Travel, a multi-generation family-owned NW PA platform with charter + school bus operations. The school bus division alone could be a carve-out target, but the company is more likely a platform-level acquisition. Active 2nd/3rd-gen family management reduces near-term succession likelihood. Strong, sticky district contracts (Reynolds served since 1948).

name: A A Transportation Co Inc
owner_or_parent: independent (Ron Ernenwein historically listed as owner per 2006 WBJ article; current ownership may have transitioned - source data lists Aleesha Humphrey Dunn as Owner; one source lists Thang Pham as CEO - ownership unclear)
principals: Aleesha Humphrey Dunn (Owner per source data, unconfirmed publicly)
districts_or_customers: 30+ public and private school districts in Central Massachusetts (Rutland, East Brookfield, Shrewsbury, North Brookfield among them)
recent_news: Featured by School Transportation Association of Massachusetts (STAM) as a hiring employer. Company website touts 30+ years of service. No recent M&A news.
fit_notes: Strong tuck-in candidate: independent, ~30 yrs old, 30+ district contracts across Central MA with diversified school/SPED/charter/limo/trucking mix. ~$8.8M revenue, ~99 employees. Conflicting ownership signals (historical Ernenwein vs. current Humphrey Dunn vs. listed Pham CEO) may indicate ownership change in flight - warrants direct outreach to clarify current control and any succession appetite.
